title: Message Authentication Codes and HMAC · Goroutine Forensics
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible replay-resistant HMAC request authenticator with one primitive, parameter, nonce, context, key, parser, trust, timing, migration, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in replay-resistant HMAC request authenticator and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal deb…
objectives: Use a MAC to provide symmetric origin authentication and integrity while stating its lack of public verifiability and non-repudiation.
Compute and verify HMAC with a supported hash, sufficient independent key, canonical message, and constant-time tag comparison.
Derive or provision separate purpose- and direction-specific MAC keys and bind the use context.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Crypto Go Mac Authenticity
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug cryptographic engineering team handles case 6484 during a credential migration window. Build deterministic Go evidence to verify a purpose-separated canonical HMAC request with freshness and durable replay rejection; record key custody, terminal failure, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk ownership; then swap the role, tenant, recipient, algorithm, or context and prove domain separation. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use a MAC to provide symmetric origin authentication and integrity while stating its lack of public verifiability and non-repudiation.

Inspect the Crypto Go Mac Authenticity trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Crypto Go Mac Authenticity.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use a mac to provide symmetric origin authentication and integrity while stating its lack of public verifiability and non-repudiation. For Cryptography and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Crypto Go Mac Authenticity, keep Crypto Go Mac Authenticity connected to executable Go behavior evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Crypto Go Replay Window
steps.instruction:
